message:
feat(core): add pane_typestate.rs — compile-time pane lifecycle safety (ft-283h4.10)

Type-state machine using zero-sized type markers (Creating, Active,
Snapshotting, Restoring, Closed) for compile-time enforcement of valid
pane state transitions. Includes SnapshotData roundtrip, TransitionLog
audit, runtime state label reflection, and 30 proptest properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
